summary: A brief update noting that an anonymous commenter disputed a previous post about Ridgid tools outsourcing production and slashing warranties. The author updated the original article in response.
key_points: Ridgid allegedly cut their warranty and outsourced tool production overseas
An anonymous commenter disputed the original claims
The author updated the original article to reflect the new information
key_insight: This is a brief housekeeping post with no substantive content to analyze.
